emails.subject: Blackbird
emails.body: Blackbird Please make sure that I am on the distribution list for ALL documentation. I only have the swap confirm/schedule. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: Re: Blackbird
emails.body: Re: Blackbird I have asked that you be placed on the distribution list--the system is down, or I would attach copies of the other documents; however, we expect new drafts from A&K tonight and I do not think it would be profitable for you to review the drafts we have of the other documents, unless you have a lot of free time on your hands (which I doubt). Sara Shackleton@ECT 12/16/99 04:09 PM
